target: Citation compliance audit: sections.json dome URL citations lacking explicit as-of date labels (ISS-2046)

documented_exceptions.justification: Both part1 occurrences are in the sentence 'as presented at [...] (Version 51.0, April 2026)'. The version number plus month-year constitutes an adequate informal date label. No reader can be misled about the temporal anchor. Accept as version-dated exception.

Occurs in the 28-domain audit table notation block: 'identifiers written WIN-NNN are the dome site's own identifiers from its status_history.json'. This explains identifier provenance, not a current factual claim. No content assertion depends on this URL being current. Accept as structural notation.
documented_exceptions.context_snippet: WIN-NNN are the dome site's own identifiers from its status_history.json

documented_exceptions.justification: These four links form an audit chain instruction: 'Audit the southern-geometry claim as an ordered chain: WIN-069 -> Australia V13 scaffold -> southern validation -> southern metric expansion.' They are navigation directives in our audit procedure, not assertions about current dome content. The validity of the audit argument does not depend on a snapshot date for these navigational anchors.
documented_exceptions.context_snippet: Audit the southern-geometry claim as an ordered chain: WIN-069 -> Australia V13 scaffold -> southern validation -> southern metric expansion

tldr_evidence: Walked all 45 dome URL citations in sections.json. 38 have a date (captured date, verified-on date, or version+month) within 200 characters. 7 lack formal as-of labels; all 7 are justified exceptions: 2 have version+date context (Part1), 1 is structural identifier notation (Part4), 4 are audit-navigation links making no factual content claims (Part8b).
tldr_verdict: ISS-2046 closes as resolved: no patches required. All 7 non-formally-dated references are documented exceptions with written justification. The 2026-04-18 in-force commitment is satisfied across all post-April-18 prose; legacy prose exceptions are now catalogued here.
